Package com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email

Provides interfaces for sending email

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Email
    Email provides interfaces for sending email using smtp server which is configured on a device or provided by a client.
    EmailAddressInfo
    Provides the email information with address.
    EmailAttributes
    The sets of attributes for sending email.
    EmailAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating EmailAttributes containing email parameters.
    NetworkCredentialsAttributes
    The sets of attributes to access destination server over network for scan.
    NetworkCredentialsAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating NetworkCredentialsAttributes containing credentials.
    ProxyAttributes
    The sets of attributes to update proxy settings.
    ProxyAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating ProxyAttributes containing proxy parameters.
    SmtpAttributes
    The sets of attributes to update SMTP information for sending email.
    SmtpAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating SmtpAttributes containing SMTP server connection parameters.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    ProxyAttributes.ProxyConfigurationMode
    Enumeration for setting configuration mode of proxy
    SmtpAttributes.TransportMode
    Enumeration of the configuration to connect to SMTP server

Package com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email Description

Provides interfaces for sending email
